I'm hungry and tired. I'd like for my boss to call so I can pass out finally.
I'm kind bummed because I think I'm going to be missing Death Cab for Cutie in brooklyn due to my trip to Arizona and back. Whatever though.
I'm thinking that Grapevine Fires is possibly my favourite new Death Cab for Cutie song. Not sure though. I've only listened 3-4 times.
Just cancelled my Audible.com subscription- where I got a credit each month. I have 2 credits (basically 2 audiobooks) left. Just bought GTD
I think I'm going to try to stay up today. At least for a while.
New Death Cab for Cutie album is just as I expected it- different and pretty much amazing.
In related news, I just escaped a 4-star wanted level in GTA. In a N.O.O.S.E. truck, no less. 50 gamer points, please thanks.
I wish I had an RSS feed of my xbox live achievements, so I could put it in my Twitterfeed and automagically twitter all my achievements.
